authorization_phrase: Authorize s17-d1 broad-universe cross-sectional momentum Tier-N spec DRAFT only — bound by DR10 v2 + walk-forward K13.
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts: inherited by-reference; cash-equity adaptations (C5 split_only documented+applied incl. MRK spin-off factor; C3 extended-hours NOT_APPLICABLE daily; C4 US equity RTH); instantiated at P2
c6_inherited_constraints_forming: K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades >= 100 total; OOS >= 50/y; no relaxation at any phase. K9-per-fold/OOS is THE PRIMARY kill-risk for this low-turnover rotation.

K13_WALK_FORWARD_BINDING (by-reference 52a3b60): locked rule positive in >=3 of 5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED OOS folds + aggregate net>0 + K9 (per-fold OR aggregate); P6.7 before P10; VALIDATION not optimization; NO per-fold refit (INVIOLATE; T-FORBID-22).
K9-per-fold/OOS shortfall under the LOCKED monthly cadence = TERMINAL BLOCK, NOT a tuning trigger; a different cadence/lookback/M is a SEPARATE fresh candidate_record_id.

RELATIVE-MOMENTUM-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING): signal=126-21 trailing return (skip-month); select top-M=6 equal-weight; exit=loss of relative rank (no trailing/ATR stop). Hypothesis (winners continue) tested at P6 IS + P6.7 K13, never assumed.
Momentum params L=126 / S=21 / M=6 / R=21(monthly) first-principles; to be JUSTIFIED (not tuned) and LOCKED at SEAL.
DA3 equal-weight 1/M sizing; DA4=B START_CASH 100000; long-only unlevered (DR11 NOT IN CHAIN).
DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-reference 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal; cash-equity cost_drag clears strong margin.
split_only adjustment convention CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse DR9-passed CSVs; switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN.
24-name broad universe LOCKED at PLAN; widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN (fresh candidate_record_id required).
DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 24 by REUSE (sealed d86e5d1; result_seal 85667ab3); NO fresh fetch; cash_equity_data_reuse_byte_equivalent.
A7 effective_independent_bets + K10 avg_pairwise_correlation + K6 dispersion LOAD-BEARING (24 names ~8 sectors); NOT the candidate's risk axis (the relative-momentum edge K1/K2/K13 is).
s16/s15/s14/s13/s12 terminal preserved verbatim; this candidate is FRESH cross-sectional momentum; clears T-FORBID-16..22; NOT re-evaluated under K13.
no_strategy_optimization_authorized: parameters first-principles justified at SEAL, NOT grid-searched; K13 fold scheme pre-committed + unsearched.
P6 IS PASS and/or K13 PASS (if reached) do NOT imply READY at OOS/live; the 6-gate live-block applies regardless; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent.

da_register.name: candidate_record_id
da_register.resolution: s17-d1-broad-universe-cross-sectional-momentum-rotation-24name-large-cap-long-history

da_register.name: mechanic_family
da_register.resolution: F-xmom: cross-sectional (relative-strength) momentum rotation, long-only, periodic rebalance (NON-trend-absolute, NON-mean-reversion)

da_register.name: position_sizing
da_register.resolution: equal_weight 1/M of equity per held name (rebalanced to equal weight each R); long-only, unlevered

da_register.name: momentum_lookback_L
da_register.resolution: 126 trading days (~6 months trailing total return); first-principles (Jegadeesh-Titman), NOT optimized

da_register.name: momentum_skip_S
da_register.resolution: 21 trading days (skip most-recent month to avoid short-term reversal; the '6-1' skip-month convention); first-principles, NOT optimized

da_register.name: ranking_selection_rule
da_register.resolution: each rebalance, rank all 24 by the (L-S)=126-21 trailing total return; SELECT the top-M. [LOAD-BEARING binding axis; relative variant]

da_register.name: top_M_held
da_register.resolution: 6 (top quartile of 24); held equal-weight

da_register.name: rebalance_cadence_R
da_register.resolution: 21 trading days (monthly); the canonical academic cross-sectional-momentum cadence. [K9-DRIVER — see k9 table]

da_register.name: exit_rule_ROTATION
da_register.resolution: a held name is fully EXITED (one closed trade) when it leaves the top-M at a rebalance; proceeds redeployed equal-weight into the new top-M. No trailing stop, no per-name ATR stop (relative-rank exit). [LOAD-BEARING]

da_register.name: DR10_definition
da_register.resolution: v2 AND-conjunction (turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05); thresholds byte-equivalent

da_register.name: DR9_data_continuity
da_register.resolution: ALL 24 PASS by REUSE of sealed CSVs at d86e5d1 (result_seal 85667ab3...); NO fresh fetch; sha-verified at BUILD

da_register.name: adjustment_convention
da_register.resolution: split_only (GOOGL 20:1 FRESH verified; AMZN 20:1/WMT 3:1/NVDA 4:1+10:1/AAPL 4:1 carried; MRK Organon spin-off encoded by Tiingo as a 1.048 splitFactor -> applied -> return-continuous, documented PASS; COST 2023 special dividend in dividend stream -> one-day drop, informational; dividends not adjusted)

da_register.name: data_vendor
da_register.resolution: tiingo (data already fetched + DR9-sealed; no new fetch)

da_register.name: universe
da_register.resolution: 24 names {AAPL,MSFT,NVDA,JPM,XOM,UNH,WMT,KO,META,AMZN,JNJ,CVX,GOOGL,V,MA,HD,PG,COST,ABBV,MRK,BAC,CAT,DIS,COP} across ~8 GICS sectors

da_register.name: portfolio_caps
da_register.resolution: hold exactly top-M=6 equal-weight; long-only; no shorting; no leverage; no pyramiding; no inter-name coordination beyond cross-sectional ranking

da_register.name: warmup_days
da_register.resolution: 160 (covers L=126 + S=21 + margin) before the first tradable rebalance

da_register.name: signal_direction
da_register.resolution: long-only (NOT bi-directional; relative-strength rotation has no short leg in this candidate)

da_register.name: K13_walk_forward_persistence
da_register.resolution: ADDED at new phase P6.7 (after P6.5, before P10): locked rule re-evaluated across N=5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED sequential OOS folds; PASS if positive (expectancy>0 AND sharpe_proxy/trade>0 AND no K1/K2) in >= ceil(0.6*5)=3 of 5 folds AND aggregate net>0 AND K9 holds (per-fold OR aggregate); else OOS_NOT_ROBUST -> REJECT_FAST. VALIDATION not optimization; NO per-fold refit (INVIOLATE)

da_register.name: K13_fold_scheme
da_register.resolution: window_mode=rolling; reserve first ~160 bars (2019-01-02..~2019-08) as initial warmup, then uniformly tile the remaining ~1599 bars into 5 contiguous equal-length OOS test folds of ~320 bars (~1.27y) each (uniform, NOT anchored to known-favorable periods); exact bar-index boundaries LOCKED byte-equivalent at SEAL, declared-before-evaluation, NEVER searched (T-FORBID-22). P10 (2024-01-02..2025-12-30) retained as the separate final hold-out

diversification_metrics_load_bearing_but.note: diversification is not the risk axis; the relative-momentum edge (K1/K2 per-fold + K13 persistence) is

dr10_v2_reachability_table_draft.expected_annual_turnover: ~1-3 (monthly top-6 rotation; turnover branch may fire alone; non-binding under the v2 AND)
dr10_v2_reachability_table_draft.expected_s2_cost_drag: ~0.2-0.6% (cash-equity per-share commission + ~1bp slippage on monthly rebalances; well under 5%)

dr9_gate_status_carried_into_draft.data_provenance_locked: 24 CSVs reused byte-equivalent from the s17 DR9-passed dir; sealed d86e5d1; result_seal 85667ab3; sha-verified at BUILD

dr_precedence_chain: DR7 -> DR1 -> DR9 -> DR10 -> DR6 -> DR4 -> DR2 -> DR3 -> DR5

dr_register.DR10_v2: turnover_cost_explosion (turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05) -> REJECT_FAST. Cash-equity cost_drag CLEARS strong margin
dr_register.DR11: NOT IN CHAIN -- cash equity unlevered
dr_register.DR4: oos_negative_while_is_positive_unexplained -> REJECT_FAST (OOS-only); K13 (P6.7) now precedes P10 and is expected to catch non-persistence earlier
dr_register.DR9: data_continuity (per-name) -> INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD. ALREADY PASSED all 24 by reuse (85667ab3)

first_principles_burden.vs_s12_s13_futures: different asset class, universe, mechanic family -- orthogonal.
first_principles_burden.vs_s15_s14_cross_sector_terminal: opposite thesis (momentum continuation vs mean-reversion); clears T-FORBID-16/17/18.
first_principles_burden.vs_s16_d1_absolute_trend_terminal: RELATIVE cross-sectional ranking, not absolute Donchian breakout; no channel/trailing-stop; long-only rotation. Clears T-FORBID-19/20/21 and T-FORBID-22 (locked params, pre-committed unsearched folds, no per-fold refit).

framework_k13_binding: walk-forward persistence (52a3b60; report_seal 4268d6f7...); binds s17+; s17 is the FIRST candidate under it

k13_walk_forward_table_draft.anti_snoop_INVIOLATE: fold count + boundaries + the >=3/5 threshold declared pre-evaluation and NEVER searched; locked params re-evaluated per fold; NO per-fold refit (T-FORBID-22)
k13_walk_forward_table_draft.pass_condition_by_reference_52a3b60: positive (expectancy>0 AND sharpe_proxy/trade>0 AND no K1/K2) in >=3 of 5 folds AND aggregate net>0 AND K9 (per-fold OR aggregate); else OOS_NOT_ROBUST -> REJECT_FAST
k13_walk_forward_table_draft.per_fold_edge_status: TBD at P6.7 (computed from the LOCKED rule; NEVER assumed at DRAFT)
k13_walk_forward_table_draft.placement: P6.7 (after P6.5 cost-stress, before P10 final hold-out)

k9_reachability_table_draft.disciplined_resolution_NOT_a_tuning_hatc: If the DRAFT/P6/P10 measured OOS trade count < K9 floor, the candidate is K9-BLOCKED (terminal) -- NOT rescued by raising cadence. A higher-cadence/wider-M variant is a SEPARATE fresh candidate_record_id (preserves no_strategy_optimization_authorized + T-FORBID-22).
k9_reachability_table_draft.k9_is_status: CLEARS aggregate over the IS span
k9_reachability_table_draft.k9_oos_p10_status: AT RISK -- monthly rotation may NOT clear the standalone >=50/y OOS floor (~24-72 over 2y)
k9_reachability_table_draft.k9_threshold_total_INVIOLATE: >=100 closed_trades; no relaxation at any phase
k9_reachability_table_draft.load_bearing_honest_read: K13's K9-component permits per-fold OR aggregate; aggregate clears. BUT the standalone P10 OOS K9 >=50/y is a SEPARATE binding gate, and a monthly top-6 rotation is genuinely AT RISK of <50/y. Edge-vs-sample tension: momentum premium is strongest monthly-to-quarterly; faster cadence adds trades but dilutes the premium.

k_gates.K10_avg_pairwise_corr: APPLICABLE; expected strong diversification (24 names ~8 sectors); LOAD-BEARING
k_gates.K12_DR_fires_on_cost_stress: if DR2/3/4/5 fires across S0/S2/S3/S4 -> FAIL_SAFETY
k_gates.K13_walk_forward_persistence: ADDED (by-reference 52a3b60); >=3/5 folds positive + aggregate net>0 + K9; else OOS_NOT_ROBUST -> REJECT_FAST. Evaluated at P6.7 before P10
k_gates.K1_sharpe_proxy_lt_0: FAIL_SAFETY at S1 (binding edge gate; per-fold + aggregate)
k_gates.K9_closed_trades_lt_100: INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE; INVIOLATE. OOS >=50/y. THE PRIMARY KILL-RISK for this low-turnover rotation

mechanic_first_principles_edge_design.exit_design: relative-rank rotation: a held name exits when it leaves the top-M (no trailing stop / no ATR stop; the exit IS the loss of relative strength)
mechanic_first_principles_edge_design.expected_effect_HYPOTHESIS_NOT_CLAIM: recent relative winners continue to relatively outperform (Jegadeesh-Titman/Asness premium); because it rotates into each regime's leaders, the LOCKED rule may stay positive across multiple sequential K13 folds -- the structural answer to s16's absolute-trend single-OOS failure. TESTED at P6 IS + P6.7 K13; NEVER assumed.
mechanic_first_principles_edge_design.rationale: After s14/s15 (mean-reversion) and s16 (absolute trend) each bet on one market geometry and failed to persist, a RELATIVE mechanic does not predict market direction -- it predicts relative continuation, and is the most K13-aligned price-only family (selection plan rev2 75a22be).
mechanic_first_principles_edge_design.selection_design: rank all 24, hold top-M=6 equal-weight; express the cross-sectional momentum premium with diversified concentration (~8 sectors)
mechanic_first_principles_edge_design.signal_design: 126-21 trailing total return (skip most-recent month to avoid short-term reversal contamination); first-principles, NOT tuned

next_phase_authorization_scope.commit_this_draft: Authorize commit s17-d1 broad-universe cross-sectional momentum Tier-N spec DRAFT only.
next_phase_authorization_scope.primary_forward: Authorize s17-d1 broad-universe cross-sectional momentum Tier-N spec SEAL only — bound by DR10 v2 + walk-forward K13.

rec1_equivalent_oos_k9_disclosure: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 (>=50/y) is AT RISK for a monthly top-6 rotation (~24-72 over 2y). If observed effective OOS trade count < 50/y, OOS K9 is unreachable -> the candidate is K9-BLOCKED (terminal), NOT rescued by cadence change. The chain shall NOT relax K9.
report_kind: S17-D1 broad-universe cross-sectional momentum rotation Tier-N spec DRAFT — carries PLAN structural locks + first-principles relative-momentum design + reused 24-name DR9 PASS, expands the DA register (DA1-DA22; DA21/DA22 add the K13 walk-forward discipline), and carries the K13-per-fold + K9-per-fold reachability tables. NOT a Tier-N SEAL.

t_forbid_clearance.T_FORBID_19_20_21_s16_revN_oos_tweak_dr4: CLEARED (fresh family + universe; no s16 patch)
t_forbid_clearance.T_FORBID_22_per_fold_refit_or_fold_schem: CLEARED (locked params; N=5 pre-committed UNSEARCHED folds; no per-fold refit)
